title: Partnership Impact
description: Title slide: effect of ten partnership rounds on search visibility and direct traffic.

title: The method
description: How the analysis compares partnership months to control months across two data sources.

title: Search visibility
description: Impressions grew ~3x faster and clicks ~2.2x faster in partnership months.

title: Direct traffic
description: Direct traffic showed no partnership lift; correlated long-run but not month-to-month.

title: Round by round
description: Direct sign-ups by consecutive month with partnership months marked; growth tracks overall momentum, not individual rounds.

title: What it means
description: Takeaways and caveats: value shows up in search exposure, not direct visits.
